spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature" and r.device == "room_00")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean)
|> yield(name: "Außentemperatur")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy.gas" and r.device == "gasmeter")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> difference()
|> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 10.76}))
|> yield(name: "Verbrauch kwH")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy.gas" and r.device == "heating")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> difference()
|> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 10.76}))
|> yield(name: "Verbrauch m³")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy.wood" and r.device == "stove")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> difference()
|> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 4.2 / 2.0}))
|> yield(name: "Verbrauch Briketts")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy.gas.water" and r.device == "heating")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> difference()
|> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 10.76 }))
|> yield(name: "Verbrauch Warmwasser m³")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "power.heating")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> integral(unit: 1h)
|> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 10.76}))
|> yield(name: "Verbrauch Heizung")

data = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature.water" and r.device == "heating")
min = data
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: min)
max = data
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
join(tables: {min: min, max: max}, on: ["_time", "_field", "_measurement"], method: "inner")
|> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value_max - r._value_min }))
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 310.0 * 1.16/10.769/1000.0/1.37}))
|> yield(name: "Verbrauch Warmwasser")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature.water")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> yield(name: "Max. Temperatur")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature.water")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: min)
|> yield(name: "Min. Temperatur")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature.water")
|> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
|> aggregateWindow(every: 600s, fn: mean)
|> difference()
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> yield(name: "Max. Temperaturänderung")
SELECT difference(mean("value"))/7/10.5 FROM "forever"."energy.gas" WHERE ("device" = 'gasmeter') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1w) fill(linear)
SELECT mean("value") FROM temperature WHERE "device"='room_00' and $timeFilter GROUP BY time(7d) fill(previous)

temps = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature" and r.device == "room_00")
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean)
gas = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy.gas" and r.device == "gasmeter")
|> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
|> difference()
join(tables: {temperature: temps, gas: gas}, on: ["_time"], method: "outer")
|> yield(name: "Verbrauch")
